title: Palak Tofu / Palak Paneer Bowl
description: A quick spinach curry made with tofu or paneer in a lightly spiced palak gravy with an optional creamy yogurt finish.

ingredients.note: diced or crushed; optional for a tangy flavor

steps: Blanch the spinach for 2–3 minutes, then blend it with the ginger until smooth.
Heat the oil or ghee in a pan. Add the cumin seeds, garlic paste, sliced onions, and black pepper. Cook until the onions are light golden brown.
Add the diced or crushed tomato (if using) and cook for 2–3 minutes until softened.
Add the tofu or paneer cubes and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the blended spinach and mix well. Simmer for 3–5 minutes.
Stir in the beaten yogurt or milk, if using, and cook for another minute without boiling. Serve hot.
notes: Skip the yogurt and use milk or a plant-based alternative for a vegan version with tofu.
The tomato is optional if you prefer a less tangy, more traditional palak flavor.
